title: knautia arvensis subsp. angustata
intro: Knautia arvensis subsp. angustata is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae, known as a type of knotweed. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its antifungal and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis subsp. angustata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Herbal preparations of Knautia arvensis subsp. angustata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for internal use, and it can also be used topically in the form of creams or ointments.
